name: API Key Row
description: API key management surface with responsive key rows/cards, masked key metadata, create-key workflow, copy/revoke actions, and a save-once creation banner.

standard.description: Full API key row with name, masked key, scope badges, dates, and copy/revoke actions.

slots.key-icon: Key icon indicator on the left
slots.key-info: Key name (_textsm _fontmedium) and masked key value (_textxs _mono _fgmuted) stacked vertically
slots.scopes: Horizontal row of scope Badge elements (read, write, org:read, org:write)
slots.actions: Copy key Button and Revoke Button (destructive variant)

card.description: Card-style API key display for mobile-friendly layouts. Stacked vertically.

slots.actions: Copy and revoke buttons, full width

visual_brief: Single horizontal row with a key icon on the far left, followed by the key name in medium-weight text and a masked key value (e.g. 'sk-****...3f2a') in monospace below it. Scope badges (read, write) appear as small colored pills in the middle. Created and last-used dates render in muted small text. Copy and revoke action buttons sit on the far right, with revoke styled as a destructive variant. Rows are separated by bottom borders. The card preset stacks everything vertically inside a bordered card for mobile use.

responsive.mobile: Prefer the card preset — stacked vertical layout with wrapped scope badges and actions that sit beneath the key metadata instead of forcing a rigid table.
responsive.tablet: Standard row or card-list layout is acceptable, but metadata should wrap before the key row overflows.
responsive.desktop: Full row layout with clear separation between key info, scopes, dates, and actions.

layout_hints.row_layout: Key icon (16px, muted) + key name + masked value + scope badges + date metadata + actions. On narrow widths, collapse into stacked cards before the metadata starts crowding.
layout_hints.reveal: Click masked value to reveal for 5 seconds, then re-mask. Copy button copies full key.
layout_hints.create_form: Inline form at top: text input for key name + scope controls + Create button (primary). Appears on 'New API Key' click.
layout_hints.creation_banner: After key creation, surface a prominent one-time reveal banner with copy action and dismissal control. This banner should feel like a temporary alert card, not just a paragraph.

composition.ApiKeyRow: Row(d-data-row, hoverable) > [KeyIcon + KeyInfo + ScopeBadges + DateInfo + Actions]
